creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Justin Hibbits from comment #0)

Hi, Justin!

Thanks a lot for your report, I didn't think that gcc behaves differently in the  name scope visibility than Clang. Apparently, that's the case.

I'm on the SambaXP right now, so didn't have time to make patch on the patch, can you try just to replace whole file in the port's files/ directory with this one?

http://freebsd.bat.ru/patch-vfs_freebsd.c
